title: Block Defense & Turret System
build_hierarchy: └── BaseTurretBuild extends Building implements Ranged, RotBlock

key_methods: drawPlace(int x, int y, int rotation, boolean valid)
updateCooling()  // consumes coolant liquid, boosts reloadCounter
init()  // sets shootY, elevation, recoilTime, trackingRange
setBars()  // adds heat bar if heatRequirement > 0
nested_static_classes: AmmoEntry { int amount; abstract BulletType type(); }

key_methods: updateTile()  // main loop: target validation, warmup, recoil, shooting
updateShooting()  // fires when reloadCounter >= reload && !charging && warmup >= minWarmup
shoot(BulletType)  // delegates to ShootPattern.shoot(), calls bullet()
bullet(BulletType, float, float, float, Mover)  // creates bullet via BulletType.create(), applies effects/sounds
handleBullet(Bullet, float, float, float)  // hook, empty in base
findTarget()  // calls findEnemy(range), optional healing target
useAmmo() -> BulletType  // decrements ammo entry, pops if empty
peekAmmo() -> BulletType  // returns top AmmoEntry.type() or null
hasAmmo() -> boolean  // checks ammo stack, calls canConsume()
control(LAccess, ...)  // logic control: sets targetPos, logicShooting
sense(LAccess) -> double  // exposes ammo, rotation, shootX/Y, shooting

key_fields: ObjectMap<Item, BulletType> ammoTypes  // ordered, item -> bulletType

key_methods: handleItem(Building, Item)  // maps item->BulletType, updates ammo stack, fires events
acceptItem(Building, Item) -> boolean  // checks ammoTypes + capacity
updateTile()  // syncs unit.ammo ratio, then super
write/read  // serializes ItemEntry list (item id + amount)
ItemTurretBuild.inner_class: ItemEntry extends AmmoEntry { Item item; BulletType type() -> ammoTypes.get(item); }

key_methods: useAmmo() -> BulletType  // removes liquid via liquids.remove(current, 1/ammoMultiplier)
hasAmmo() -> boolean  // checks ammoTypes contains current liquid AND amount >= threshold
acceptLiquid(Building, Liquid) -> boolean  // checks ammoTypes + current liquid compatibility
findTarget()  // if extinguish && liquid.canExtinguish(): scans tiles for Fire entities first, then super
updateTile()  // syncs unit.ammo with liquid ratio, then super

key_fields: BulletType shootType  // single fixed bullet type

key_methods: hasAmmo() -> true  // always rotatable; canConsume() handles power check

key_relationships: TurretBuild uses DrawBlock drawer (delegation: draw, load, icons)
TurretBuild uses BulletType (creates bullets via BulletType.create())
ItemTurretBuild.ItemEntry extends AmmoEntry (implements type() via ammoTypes lookup)
PowerTurret has single BulletType shootType (no ammo stack needed)
shooting_flow: updateShooting() → reloadCounter >= reload && !charging() && warmup >= minWarmup → shoot(peekAmmo())
shoot(type) → ShootPattern.shoot(barrelCounter, callback) → bullet(type, xOffset, yOffset, angle, mover)
shoot() → consumeAmmoOnce=true → useAmmo() [once per shot pattern]
bullet() → consumeAmmoOnce=false → useAmmo() [once per individual bullet]
bullet() → BulletType.create(this, team, x, y, angle, ...) → handleBullet(bullet, ...)
bullet() → applies shootEffect, smokeEffect, shootSound, ammoUseEffect, shake

ammo_consumption_logic.ItemTurretBuild: handleItem() adds ItemEntry to ammo stack; useAmmo() pops/decrements by ammoPerShot; BulletType from ammoTypes[item]
ammo_consumption_logic.LiquidTurretBuild: useAmmo() removes liquid: liquids.remove(current, 1/type.ammoMultiplier); hasAmmo() checks liquids.currentAmount() >= threshold
ammo_consumption_logic.PowerTurretBuild: useAmmo() returns fixed shootType, no resource consumed; power.status checked via canConsume()
ammo_consumption_logic.common: consumeAmmoOnce=true: useAmmo() called once in shoot(); false: once per bullet() call

burst_behavior_note: No dedicated BurstTurret class found. Burst firing is implemented via ShootPattern (field: shoot) in Turret. ShootPattern.shots > 1 with firstShotDelay > 0 triggers charging() state. charging() = queuedBullets > 0 && shoot.firstShotDelay > 0. Shots are queued with Time.run(delay, ...) callbacks.
logic_control: TurretBuild.control(LAccess.shoot, p1, p2, p3, p4): sets targetPos, logicControlTime=120, logicShooting=!zero(p3)
control(LAccess.shootp, Posc, ...): calls targetPosition(pos), sets logicShooting
isShooting(): isControlled() ? unit.isShooting() : logicControlled() ? logicShooting : target != null
important_notes: TurretBuild.ammo is a Seq<AmmoEntry> stack (peek = current ammo type, last = highest priority)
hasAmmo() does priority swap if peek has insufficient amount
range() adds peekAmmo().rangeChange to base range dynamically
heatRequirement: if >0, efficiency is scaled by heatReq/heatRequirement (up to maxHeatEfficiency=3x)
LiquidTurretBuild.findTarget() uniquely checks for Fire entities if liquid.canExtinguish()
DrawBlock drawer delegates all rendering (draw, drawPlan, icons, getRegionsToOutline)
Coolant system in ReloadTurretBuild: boosts reloadCounter via liquid heat capacity
